name: MaxiTRANS Industries Limited
summary: MaxiTRANS Industries Limited, together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, sells, services, and repairs transport equipment and related components and spare parts in Australia and New Zealand. It manufactures trailer brands, and urethane foam and body panels; supplies and distributes parts; provides service and repair support; and sells and finances new and used trailing equipment. The company's products include tautliners, semi-trailers, skels, refrigerated and dry freight vans, semi-tippers, side-tippers, truck bodies and dog tippers, moving floors, multi-loaders, and dollies. It is also involved in the retail and wholesale of trailer and truck parts. The company sells its products under the Freighter, Maxi-CUBE, Hamelex White, Lusty EMS, Trout River, AZMEB, Peki, and MaxiPARTS brand names. It serves agriculture, general and refrigerated freight, infrastructure, manufacturing, mining and waste management industries. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Derrimut, Australia.
